steps.title: Use same-side interior angles
steps.content: Lines $m$ and $n$ are parallel. The angle labeled $x$ and the angle labeled $26^\circ$ are same-side interior angles formed by a transversal, so they are supplementary.

steps.title: Solve the angle equation
steps.content:
Supplementary angles add to $180^\circ$, so set up and solve the equation:
$$x+26=180$$
$$x=154$$
This value matches the requested angle measure. The answer is D.
